revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - ": (Text replacement - "" to ""
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - ")links on [[:Category" to "links on " to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"

Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:[[Category:" to "[[Category:"
Text replacement - "↵]]↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|京都府|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|京都府|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} {{Commons category|Archaeological sites in Kyoto prefecture}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:京都府の考古遺跡]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:京都府の考古遺跡|version=63002206}} [[Category:Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:History of Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[commons:Category:Archaeological sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[ja:Category:京都府の考古遺跡]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:京都府の古墳]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: ==Japanese Content== {{Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture|京都府|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture|京都府|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} {{Commons category|Archaeological sites in Kyoto prefecture}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:京都府の考古遺跡}} {{translated page|ja|Category:京都府の考古遺跡|version=63002206}} [[co:commons:Category:Archaeological sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:京都府の考古遺跡]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:京都府の古墳]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q28863715}} [[Category:Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:History of Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
